description: The per-player estimated value expression `p.TSI * EstimatedValueMultiplier` is duplicated at lines 22 and 42, once inside GetTeamTotals (as a Sum lambda) and again inside GetTeamAverages (as an Average lambda). If the formula changes, both lambdas must be updated. Should be extracted to a private static helper: `private static decimal GetPlayerEstimatedValue(Player p) => p.TSI * EstimatedValueMultiplier;`
suggestedFix:
Extract a private static method:
  private static decimal GetPlayerEstimatedValue(Player p) => p.TSI * EstimatedValueMultiplier;
Then replace both lambdas:
  TotalEstimatedValue = players.Sum(GetPlayerEstimatedValue),
  AvgEstimatedValue   = players.Average(p => (double)GetPlayerEstimatedValue(p)),

description: The identical three-player list (tsi:4500/2000/7000, wage:10000/8000/15000, nationalityId:1/2/3, all healthy, zero cards) is copy-pasted verbatim across three consecutive test methods: GetTeamTotals_WithMultiplePlayers_ReturnsSumOfTSI (line 178), GetTeamTotals_WithMultiplePlayers_ReturnsSumOfWage (line 191), and GetTeamTotals_WithMultiplePlayers_ReturnsSumOfEstimatedValue (line 205). All three tests exercise different assertions on the exact same input data.
